Unmatched Performance

Snapdragon 8 Elite

Experience gaming at the highest level with the most powerful processor ever. The 3nm Snapdragon 8 Elite delivers extreme performance with dedicated Red Core R4 esports chip for low-latency gaming.

Processor: Snapdragon 8 Elite (3nm)
CPU: Oryon up to 4.32GHz
GPU: Adreno 830
RAM: 12GB/16GB LPDDR5X
Storage: 256GB/512GB UFS 4.1
Game Space: Advanced Cube Engine

Revolutionary 144Hz Display

144Hz Flat AMOLED

The ultra-smooth 6.85-inch flat AMOLED display with 144Hz refresh rate delivers exceptional gaming and streaming experiences. With 2500Hz instantaneous touch sampling and 95.1% screen-to-body ratio, you get pure immersion.

Size: 6.85" Flat AMOLED
Resolution: 2688 × 1216 (1.5K)
Refresh Rate: 144Hz LTPO
Touch Sampling: 2500Hz Max / 960Hz Global
Brightness: 1800 Nits Peak
Protection: Gorilla Glass 7i

Advanced ICE Cooling

4D Ice-Step Vapor Chamber

The advanced ICE cooling system with active turbo fan, vapor chamber, graphene layers, and 4D Ice-Step technology ensures sustained peak performance during intense gaming sessions without throttling.

Cooling Type: ICE Cooling with Turbo Fan
Vapor Chamber: 4D Ice-Step
Graphene: Multi-layer Graphene
Efficiency: Up to 50% Better

Pro Photography System

Pro Photography System

50MP Dual Camera

Capture professional-grade photos with the dual camera system featuring a 50MP main sensor with optical image stabilization and OmnVision OV50A sensor for exceptional image quality.

Main Camera: 50MP f/1.9 OIS
Sensor: OmnVision OV50A
Ultrawide: 8MP f/2.2
Front Camera: 16MP Under-Display
Video: 8K@30fps / 4K@60fps

Massive 7000mAh Battery

7,000 mAh Silicon-Carbon

All-Day Gaming Power

The massive 7000mAh silicon-carbon battery ensures you can game all day without breaking a sweat. With 80W fast charging globally (120W in China), you're always ready for the next battle.

Capacity: 7000mAh Si-C Battery
Charging (Global): 80W Fast Charge
Charging (China): 120W Fast Charge
Bypass Charging: Gaming Mode Supported
Battery Life: All-Day Gaming
